details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory is MISSING. Expected top-level directories (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) all present. reports/audit/ present but reports/board/ absent.
governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ missing (required by governance contract). memory_bank/ has key docs, .cursor/automations/ exists with README + specs, reports/audit/ exists.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory exists with active code (board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, memory_evolution.py). Scripts referencing moltbot: scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py. These are code/config references (not excluded reports/audit or docs).
